title: A Trip to the Supermarket
content: On Sunday afternoon, Carla drove to the supermarket to buy food for the week. She carried a long shopping list in her hand because she always forgot something important. The store was crowded, and many families pushed carts through the aisles. Carla compared prices carefully and looked for fresh vegetables and fruit. Near the bakery section, the smell of warm bread filled the air. Before leaving, she bought a small chocolate cake as a reward for herself. At home, she unpacked everything while listening to music in the kitchen.
